title: AROMISTICO Coffee 1 kg
description: Aromistico is a smooth Brazilian blend with a naturally sweet profile and a velvety body.
Expect notes of roasted nuts, milk chocolate, and a gentle caramel finish.
Perfect for espresso lovers who enjoy a balanced, everyday cup.

title: SEGAFREDO Intermezzo 1 kg
description: A bold and energetic Brazilian roast crafted for those who prefer intensity.
Rich crema, deep cocoa tones, and a slightly spicy aftertaste.
Ideal for cappuccino and latte due to its strong flavor structure.

title: KENYA AA Premium 500g
description: Kenya AA Premium is known for its bright acidity and vibrant fruit-forward profile.
Expect juicy notes of blackcurrant, citrus zest, and floral undertones.
A refreshing cup perfect for pour-over or Chemex brewing.

title: KENYA Safari Roast 250g
description: Safari Roast delivers a lively Kenyan character with a crisp, clean finish.
Flavors of red berries, grapefruit, and subtle herbal hints.
Excellent choice for filter coffee enthusiasts.

title: COLOMBIA Supremo 1 kg
description: Colombia Supremo offers a silky body with a naturally sweet aroma.
Taste notes include caramel, almond, and gentle citrus brightness.
A versatile coffee suitable for both espresso and filter brewing.

title: COLOMBIA Sierra Nevada 500g
description: Grown in the high mountains of Sierra Nevada, this coffee is smooth and aromatic.
Expect flavors of honey, cocoa, and soft tropical fruit.
Perfect for slow morning brews and French press.

title: AROMISTICO Coffee 1 kg
description: Aromistico delivers a comforting Brazilian sweetness with a creamy mouthfeel.
Notes of hazelnut, cocoa, and toasted sugar dominate the cup.
Great for espresso machines and moka pots.

title: SEGAFREDO Intermezzo 1 kg
description: A strong and expressive blend with a classic Italian-style roast.
Expect dark chocolate, toasted spices, and a lingering finish.
Perfect for milk-based drinks and strong espresso shots.

title: KENYA AA Premium 500g
description: A bright and aromatic Kenyan coffee with a juicy, wine-like acidity.
Flavors of blackcurrant, plum, and citrus peel.
Ideal for V60, Aeropress, and light-roast lovers.

title: KENYA Safari Roast 250g
description: Safari Roast is a lively, fruit-forward Kenyan blend.
Expect raspberry, lime, and subtle floral notes.
A refreshing choice for manual brewing methods.

title: COLOMBIA Supremo 1 kg
description: Supremo beans deliver a balanced Colombian profile with a smooth finish.
Caramel sweetness, nutty undertones, and a hint of citrus.
Perfect for both espresso and filter coffee.

title: COLOMBIA Sierra Nevada 500g
description: A gentle and aromatic Colombian coffee from the Sierra Nevada region.
Notes of honey, cocoa nibs, and soft fruit sweetness.
Great for slow brews and relaxed mornings.
